title: Not Enough Terrifying
description: I've created this modpack for people who REALLY want to be scared in Minecraft, so I'd advise the more sensitive ones not to download it.
body:
NOT ENOUGH TERRIFYING

This horror modpack has been created for those who wish to experience a more intense level of fear in Minecraft. It should be noted that it is not suitable for those who are particularly sensitive. It contains a number of mods that will enhance the overall atmosphere of Minecraft, including the recent "Dwellers" and the From The Fog mod/datapack.

Tips & Tricks

You can easily play with your friends by adding the mod Essential or simply by hosting a server. It's always more fun with more than one person, especially when it's your friends who are affected and not you!

⚠ Warning! ⚠

This mod pack contains mods that produce loud noises and jumpscares. Think twice before using them.

Permission

If you want to use my modpack in a video, ask me for permission on discord.
